focus: C565: Kalman filter state-space model + forward prediction
deliverables: Studied Kalman filter fundamentals: recursive Bayesian estimation with Gaussian assumptions
Built 2D state-space Kalman filter (scripts/kalman_2d_prediction.py) for [humidity, temperature]
95% variance reduction on DHT22 data (raw var 0.022 → filtered var 0.0011)
Kalman gain decreases over time (0.5→0.2) — filter becomes confident in model
Connection to Lyla's toolkit: KF = GP with RBF kernel, KF = recursive Bayesian inference
next: Grade P_C565 prediction when next ESP32 reading available, or extend Kalman filter to handle trend detection (add velocity state for drift tracking)
